sp_widget.name: Knowledge Article Browser
sp_widget.description: Browse knowledge articles from published KBs. Shows available KBs and articles based on user permissions. Allows text search and category filtering.
sp_widget.template:
Knowledge Base

Search and browse knowledge articles


{{kb.label}}
Access Restricted

You do not have permission to view articles in this Knowledge Base.

{{article.short_description}} {{article.state_label}}
{{article.category || 'Uncategorized'}}   {{article.author}}   {{article.created_on | date:'yyyy-MM-dd'}}   {{article.views || 0}}
{{article.text | limitTo: 200}}{{article.text.length > 200 ? '...' : ''}}
No Articles Found

There are no articles in this Knowledge Base yet, or your search returned no results.

{{c.selectedArticle.short_description}}

{{c.selectedArticle.kb_name}} {{c.selectedArticle.state_label}}

Category: {{c.selectedArticle.category || 'Uncategorized'}}

Author: {{c.selectedArticle.author}}

Last Updated: {{c.selectedArticle.updated_on | date:'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'}}

Views: {{c.selectedArticle.views || 0}}

{{c.selectedArticle.text}}

Loading...
